name: French Apple Pie Bars
recipeInstructions:
For crust: Combine 2 cups flour with salt. Cut in shortening until the mixture resembles particles like peas. Set aside 1 cup of the mixture. Add water to the remaining mixture; stir with a fork. Roll out to fit a 9x13-inch pan.
For filling: Combine apples with sugar and place over the crust. Combine the reserved 1 cup of mixture with brown sugar, 1/4 cup flour, and cinnamon. Sprinkle over top.
Bake at 400 degrees F. for 35 to 40 minutes.
